nasb.text: He who leads the upright astray in an evil way Will himself fall into his own pit, But the blameless will inherit good.

esv.text: Whoever misleads the upright into an evil way will fall into his own pit, but the blameless will have a goodly inheritance.

cnv.text: 誘惑正直人走上邪路的， 必掉在自己所挖的坑裡； 完全人卻必承受福氣。

ccb.text: 引诱正直人走邪道， 必掉进自己设的陷阱； 但纯全无过的人必承受福分。

csbs.text: 使正直人迷失到邪路上的， 必掉进自己的坑里； 而纯全人必继承福份。
